name: Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites and sugars together until stiff peaks form.
2. Gently fold in the corn flakes, chopped pecans, coconut, and vanilla until combined.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
